error_signature: could not connect to ai agent node
title: Connection issue with AI Agent node due to CSP
symptom: The Chat node cannot connect to the AI Agent node, and no error message is displayed. The AI Agent node does not appear as expected in the interface.
applies_when: Using Caddy as a reverse proxy
not_this_if: Using default n8n settings without a reverse proxy
root_cause: The issue arises from misconfigured Content-Security-Policy (CSP) settings in the reverse proxy, which can block necessary resources or connections required for the AI Agent node to function properly.
fix_steps: Remove the problematic Content-Security-Policy configurations from the reverse proxy settings.
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Adjust the CSP settings in your reverse proxy and restart n8n.
